$comment: Brand identity + positioning + financials. Factual context, not strategy.

_changelog.2.2: S55: brand_equity_level (low/medium/high) + creative_zone (min/max/dominant 0-10) added. Determine viable copy/visual cursor and concept optionality. Canon V3 §3, §4.3.
_changelog.2.1: S30d-close: purchase_driver added (brand-level default, cascades to audiences). audience_trees[] added (optional marketplaces). Per D#243, D#244, D#246, D#250.
_changelog.1.5: S26e: No structural change to brand.json. Version bump for alignment with spec.json v1.5 (perishability, licensing, dynamic pricing, product_condition). All index-level fields unchanged.
_changelog.1.4: S26d: products_index[].product_category added (physical|physical_electronic|digital|service). Discriminated union for product nature — enables index-level routing to correct spec blocks. Backward compatible: null = physical (default).
_changelog.1.3: S26c: products_index[].type added (functional|sensory|lifestyle) — mirrors spec.json identity.type for index-level filtering without opening each file.
_changelog.1.2: S26b: products_index[].enriched added (true = has spec+offers folder, false = listed from catalogue only). products_index[].price added for quick reference on non-enriched products.
_changelog.1.1: S26: audiences_index[] added (mirrors products_index for audience pockets). market.external_intelligence[] was added earlier in S26.

creative_zone._notes: Empty until N creatives have been decomposed. <10 = hypothesis. brand_equity_level: low = needs hook+angle+proof stacked, medium = hook or angle alone can carry, high = logo alone suffices. Canon V3 §3, §4.3.

_notes.style: How the brand speaks. E.g. 'direct, playful, expert'

proofs._notes: Brand-level aggregated proofs. Product-specific proofs live in spec.json.

platforms._notes: Platform account IDs and activation status. Add platforms as needed.

_notes.avg_cogs_pct: Average COGS as % of retail price across products.
_notes.roas_breakeven: Minimum ROAS to cover COGS + ad spend. Computed: 1 / avg_gross_margin.

monthly_revenue_distribution._notes: % of annual revenue per month. Total ≈ 100.

contacts._notes: Key contacts for the brand. Add/remove roles as needed.

_notes.confidence: 0-100. Based on volume and recency of competitive intelligence.

_notes.primary_channel: meta | google | tiktok | organic | email | retail

awareness_distribution._notes: Estimated % split across market. Total = 100. Product-level overrides in spec.json.

regulatory._notes: Legal/compliance facts that affect messaging and claims.

_notes.signal: The market insight in one sentence. Factual, not interpreted.
_notes.source: Where it was found: URL, report name, forum thread title.
_notes.platform: reddit | trustpilot_competitor | amazon | google_trends | ad_library | industry_report | forum
_notes.type: trend | competitor_move | pricing_signal | demand_signal | regulatory | category_shift
_notes.confidence: high | medium | low. Based on source reliability + recency.

market._notes_external_intelligence: VoM (Voice of Market) — category-level signals NOT from this brand's customers. When entries > 10, consider migrating to a separate market.json entity.

_notes.type: functional | sensory | lifestyle. Mirrors spec.json identity.type. Allows index-level filtering by product category without opening each spec.
_notes.product_category: physical | physical_electronic | digital | service. Mirrors spec.json identity.product_category. Determines which spec blocks are relevant (composition vs device_features vs digital_specs vs service_specs). Default: physical. Null = physical (backward compat with v1.3).
_notes.enriched: true = has products/{slug}/ folder with spec.json + offers.json. false = listed from catalogue scrape only (no folder). validate-resources skips enriched:false products.
_notes.price: Unit price from catalogue scrape. Quick reference for non-enriched products. Source of truth for enriched products = products/{slug}/spec.json pricing.price.

audiences_index.name: Example Audience
audiences_index._notes: Read-only index. Source of truth = audiences/{slug}/profile.json. Gives agents a flat view of all audience pockets without opening each file. validate-resources checks index ↔ folders consistency.
